name: Content Scheduler
description: Plan, write, and schedule social media posts across Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, and more from one place. Suggests optimal posting times based on your audience engagement patterns.
author: ProwlrBot Team

before_after.before: Logging into 4 different platforms every day, posting inconsistently, forgetting to promote that blog post you spent 6 hours writing
before_after.after: A full week of posts queued across all platforms in one 30-minute Sunday session, publishing at the times your audience is most active

user_stories.quote: I used to spend an hour a day just posting to social. Now I batch a whole week in 30 minutes on Sunday and my engagement actually went up 40%.
user_stories.name: Kayla J.

user_stories.quote: It suggested I post on LinkedIn at 7:45 AM Tuesday instead of noon. That one change tripled my impressions. Data beats guessing.
user_stories.name: Andre M.

user_stories.quote: I run social for three different client accounts. This lets me manage all of them from one dashboard without ever mixing up which account I'm posting from.
user_stories.name: Tiffany R.

setup_steps.instruction: Connect your social media accounts (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.) through OAuth.
Set your content categories — promotional, educational, behind-the-scenes, engagement, etc.
Choose a posting frequency for each platform (e.g., 1x/day on Twitter, 3x/week on LinkedIn).
Enable smart scheduling to let the agent pick optimal posting times based on your audience data.
Optionally connect a content source (blog RSS, Google Sheets, Notion) to auto-generate promotional posts.
